guidance: Promote the Black Arrow platform (blackarrow.ltd/app) through its real offers: the 14-day full-access free trial (no card needed, cancel anytime) and the referral deal (refer a business, when they subscribe you both get a free month, tracked automatically). Angle it around a real pain the platform kills (tool sprawl, missed calls, slow follow-up, no revenue reporting). Lead with value, end with the TRIAL keyword CTA. Never invent features or plan pricing; point plan questions to the site.
evidence_note: Only features and offers actually published on blackarrow.ltd/app. No invented pricing or results.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Platform / Free Trial Promo' was the most under-served eligible category (target 12%, recent 10%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves and depth for educational offer content. Tool sprawl is a real, specific pain point that frames the platform's unified feature set and referral offer without hype.
